data.content: Plan review approved. The plan is complete, feasible, and aligned with repo constraints: it keeps grooming advisory, isolates stale-age logic behind pure helpers with injected time, avoids automatic workflow-state mutation, uses explicit trigger-level agent/model choice to satisfy the quota-selection requirement without broad settings churn, and keeps client API additions out of `src/lib/api.ts` to respect file-size limits. Test coverage targets the critical risks: age classification, payload shaping, prompt/result parsing, invalid selected agents, and full repo quality gates. Implementation should keep the UI rail compact and should use `updated` vs `created` only if user/product feedback later clarifies that "stale" means last touched rather than created age.
